name: super-oracle
description: Consult Sakana Fugu Ultra via codex-fugu as a second-opinion oracle for deep review, debugging, planning, and research.

interface.shortDescription: Fugu Ultra second-opinion oracle via codex-fugu
interface.longDescription: Ask the bundled skill to invoke codex-fugu (Sakana Fugu Ultra, an external CLI prerequisite) as an oracle for deep code review, hard cross-file debugging, architecture and refactor planning, and research synthesis. Use it like a built-in oracle when you want a stronger reasoning model than the main agent.
defaultPrompt: Use the super oracle to review this plan.
Ask the super oracle for a second opinion on this bug.
